xEnrich 0.1.0

  • Changelog

Group-wise IHC Enrichment Analysis

Source: R/enrich_by_hpa_ihc.R
enrich_by_hpa_ihc.Rd

Applies enrichment testing across multiple groups (e.g. tissues, cell types) using Human Protein Atlas (HPA) Immunohistochemistry (IHC) data. For each group, genes are ranked or categorised by IHC expression level and tested for enrichment of gene_list.

enrich_by_hpa_ihc(
  gene_list,
  reference_df,
  group_col = "Tissue",
  remove_levels_of_reliability = "Uncertain",
  method = c("hypergeometric", "gsea"),
  universe = NULL,
  universe_type = c("global", "group", "provided"),
  min_overlap = 1L,
  min_background = 10L,
  gene_stats = NULL,
  expression_levels = c("Low", "Medium", "High"),
  alternative = c("greater", "less", "two.sided"),
  seed = NULL,
  ...
)

Arguments

gene_list

Character vector of gene symbols (the query set).

reference_df

Data frame of HPA IHC data. Must contain columns Gene, Level, and the column named in group_col. A Reliability column is used for filtering if present.

group_col

Character scalar. Column to group by (e.g. "Tissue", "Cell.type"). Default "Tissue".

remove_levels_of_reliability

Character vector of reliability labels to exclude. Default "Uncertain".

method

Character. "hypergeometric" (default) or "gsea".

universe

Optional character vector. Required when universe_type = "provided".

universe_type

Character. How to construct the per-group background:

"global"

All unique genes in reference_df.

"group"

Only genes measured within the group being tested.

"provided"

Use the universe argument directly.

min_overlap

Integer. Minimum number of gene_list genes that must overlap the group universe. Groups below this threshold are silently skipped. Default 1.

min_background

Integer. Minimum background size required to attempt enrichment. For hypergeometric: number of expressed genes in the group. For GSEA: length of the ranking vector. Groups below this are silently skipped. Default 10.

gene_stats

Optional named numeric vector of pre-computed gene scores. Used only when method = "gsea" and universe_type = "provided".

expression_levels

Character vector of IHC levels treated as "expressed" for the hypergeometric test. Default c("Low", "Medium", "High").

alternative

Character. "greater" (default), "less", or "two.sided".

seed

Optional integer seed for GSEA permutations.

...

Additional arguments passed to run_enrichment() for GSEA (n_perm, gsea_weight, adaptive, adaptive_mode, alpha, eps).

Value

A data frame with one row per group that passed filters, containing enrichment results plus a padj column (BH adjustment across groups). Returns an empty data frame if no groups pass.

See also

run_enrichment(), enrich_by_hpa()

Contents

Developed by Artur Shvetcov.
